issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.

scenarios.name: Train a small GPT from scratch in ~2 hours on one GPU
scenarios.rationale: Treatment clones jingyaogong/minimind, runs `download_data.py`, then `train_pretrain.py` → `train_sft.py` → `train_dpo.py` with the documented flags; baseline writes a generic nanoGPT-style loop and misses the SFT/DPO pipeline.

scenarios.name: LoRA-fine-tune the base model on medical Q&A
scenarios.rationale: Treatment invokes `train_lora.py --base_model ./checkpoints/sft/best.pt --data_path ./data/medical_qa.jsonl --lora_rank 8 --lora_alpha 16` and uses the documented `conversations` JSONL format; baseline reaches for peft/HuggingFace instead of MiniMind's script.
